title: Spanish Sweet Potato Tacos
description: A delicious and easy-to-make vegan taco recipe with roasted sweet potatoes and a hint of Spanish flavor.

ingredients.name: Spanish
ingredients.notes: This refers to the Spanish seasonings, such as cumin and chili powder.

instructions: Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
Place the sweet potatoes in a bowl and drizzle with melted sugar.
Sprinkle the Spanish seasonings over the sweet potatoes and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the sweet potatoes to a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Warm the tacos according to the package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing the roasted sweet potatoes in the taco shells.
